source.description: One reviewed six-panel handmade marker contact sheet cropped into five cumulative process masters and one final boombox master.
source.notes: Keep the same face-free front-facing boombox, squat rectangular body, handle, two speaker circles, center cassette window, button row, antenna, magenta-and-cyan fill, and blue ground shadow in every panel.

process_strategy: One contact sheet grows a front-facing face-free boombox from a light box through its handle, speakers, cassette window, controls, antenna, and already-established marker fills; the last panel only strengthens outlines and tidies color.

final_elements.name: boombox body
final_elements.description: A squat front-facing rectangular radio body with softly rounded corners.

final_elements.name: top handle
final_elements.description: A thick arch handle attached to the established top edge.

final_elements.name: speaker circles
final_elements.description: Two large matching circular speakers spaced across the front panel.

final_elements.name: cassette window and control row
final_elements.description: A small central cassette window and a row of simple round controls between the speakers.

final_elements.name: antenna and blue ground shadow
final_elements.description: A short angled antenna and a loose blue shadow underneath the already outlined radio.

final_elements.name: magenta and cyan marker fill
final_elements.description: Magenta body panels and cyan speaker and control accents applied to existing shapes.

frames.visible_job: Draw a light squat rectangular radio body with soft corners and a centered front panel.
Attach a thick top handle directly to the established body.
Add two large matching speaker circles inside the established front panel.
Place the cassette window and simple control row in the existing open center area.
Add the antenna and blue shadow, then ink the existing radio shapes and fill the established panels magenta and cyan.

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthen existing black outlines, tidy the already-present magenta, cyan, and blue fills, and add tiny highlights to existing controls and speakers.

rejection_checks: Reject if the body, handle, speaker placement, cassette window, controls, or antenna changes between panels.
Reject if a panel inks, colors, or shades a feature that was not already visible in an earlier panel.
Reject clean vector-icon edges, polished poster rendering, words, labels, faces, decorative borders, or speaker logos.
